title: Light Fudge Frosting
ingredients: 1 pound semisweet chocolate, chopped or 2 2/3 cups semisweet chocolate chips
instructions: Place cream, corn syrup and sugar in medium saucepan and bring to boil over high heat.
Remove from heat and add butter, vanilla and chocolate, stirring until smooth.
Refrigerate until just cool and whip to desired consistency.
Top each cupcake with non-pareil chocolate candy and non-pareil white sprinkles.
